---
title: "A Short and Plain Instruction for the better Understanding of the Lord\'s Supper, with the Necessary Preparation requir\'d for the benefit of young Communicants"
---

## A Short and Plain Instruction for the better Understanding of the Lord\'s Supper, with the Necessary Preparation requir\'d for the benefit of young Communicants

**Author:** The Rt. Rev. Thomas Wilson
**Date:** 1734? 1735?
**Imprint:** Dublin: Jones

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
